title: The Inflection: Aquaculture Overtakes Capture Fisheries
subtitle: Global aquatic animal production, 2022
description: In 2022, for the first time, aquaculture produced more aquatic animals than capture fisheries — 51 percent of the total. This is the structural shift that makes aquaculture technology a category. Capture fisheries cannot be sensor-optimised; farmed systems can.

data.meta: 51% of total — first time above capture
approximate; total aquatic animal production 185.4 Mt

notes: Capture figure derived: aquaculture 94.4 Mt at 51% implies total aquatic animals ~185.4 Mt (stated by FAO), so capture ~91.0 Mt. The precise capture split should be confirmed against SOFIA's own breakdown before use. This is the single most important chart in the pitch — use it once, early.

secondary_data_for_context.note: Additional SOFIA figures the webpage may render as stat tiles alongside this chart.

tiles.label: Inland share of farmed aquatic animals
